questions.questionText: What is the first step when approaching an emergency scene?
What is the correct ratio of chest compressions to rescue breaths in adult CPR?
What does the "A" stand for in the ABCs of first aid?
How should you treat a minor heat burn?
questions.optionC: Run cool water over it for at least 10 minutes

questions.questionText: What is the main sign of a stroke according to the FAST acronym?
Which NDT method uses sound waves to detect internal flaws?
Liquid Penetrant Testing (PT) is used to detect:
Which NDT method is only applicable to ferromagnetic materials?
In Radiographic Testing (RT), what indicates a crack on the film?
What is "Capillary Action" related to?
What are the three elements of the Fire Triangle?
Which class of fire involves energized electrical equipment?
What does the PASS acronym stand for when using an extinguisher?
A Class K fire extinguisher is specifically designed for:
Which type of extinguisher should NEVER be used on an electrical fire?
What is "Primary Well Control"?
questions.optionB: Maintaining hydrostatic pressure greater than formation pressure

questions.questionText: What is a "Kick"?
questions.optionA: A mechanical failure of the drill bit
questions.optionB: An unscheduled entry of formation fluid into the wellbore
questions.optionC: The movement of the drill string

D) Closing the diverter
Correct: B
